meaning: n.重量不足,不符合要求的重量adj.重量不足的
examples: Women who smoke risk giving birth to underweight babies.
Nearly a third of the children were severely underweight.
We took an underweight position in Ecuadorian bonds.
In addition, they have a higher risk of having underweight babies with health problems.
Fund manager Jeff Mortimer on his highest-rated holdings and why he remains underweight in energy.
